title: Cuneiform Tablet #0799: Hellenistic Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
